bird.name: Rufous crab hawk
bird.summary: The rufous crab hawk (Buteogallus aequinoctialis) or rufous crab-hawk, is a Near Threatened species of bird of prey in subfamily Accipitrin…

relations.subject: Rufous crab hawk
relations.evidence: It primarily inhabits mangroves but also occurs in swamps, wet savanna, and river edges near the coast, all essentially at sea level
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
